ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, ORDER DEFAULT OF SEP-08-2016 SET ASIDE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS PROVIDENCE GROUP, INC. AND PROVIDENCE SAN FRANCISCO NURSING FACILITY, LLC'S MOTION TO VACATE ENTRY OF DEFAULT IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT OF THE MOVING DEFENDANTS ENTERED ON SEPTEMBER 8, 2016 IS SET ASIDE. DEFENDANTS HAVE SHOWN ENTITLEMENT TO THE RELIEF THEY SEEK PER THE MANDATORY RELIEF PROVISIONS OF CCP 473(B) AND THE STRONG PUBLIC POLICY OF DECIDING CASES ON THEIR MERIT. NO FEES OR COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF DELIA SOTIO BECAUSE UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES OF THIS CASE IT WAS NOT REASONABLE TO TAKE THE DEFAULT OF DEFENDANTS OR TO REFUSE TO STIPULATE TO THE SETTING ASIDE OF THE DEFAULT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendants Providence Group, Inc. and Providence San Francisco Nursing Facility, LLC's motion to vacate entry of default is granted. The default of the moving defendants entered on September 8, 2016 is set aside. Defendants have shown entitlement to the relief they seek per the mandatory relief provisions of CCP 473(b) and the strong public policy of deciding cases on their merit. NO fees or costs are awarded to plaintiff Delia Sotio because under the circumstances of this case it was not reasonable to take the default of defendants or to refuse to stipulate to the setting aside of the default. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Continued To Feb-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
